steps.t: Talfadan can be found at Pel Dúven, north-east of the South-gate. You should try and talk some sense into Talfadan.
Farming tools can be found around Pel Dúven. You should gather the farming tools for Talfadan.
The last farm tool is located in the fields at Pel Dúven. Collect the final farm tool for Talfadan.
Talfadan is at Pel Dúven. Return to Talfadan with the farm tools.
